nasb.text: However, Hezekiah humbled the pride of his heart, both he and the inhabitants of Jerusalem, so that the wrath of the Lord did not come on them in the days of Hezekiah.

esv.text: But Hezekiah humbled himself for the pride of his heart, both he and the inhabitants of Jerusalem, so that the wrath of the Lord did not come upon them in the days of Hezekiah.

cnv.text: 但希西家因為自己心高氣傲而謙卑下來，他和耶路撒冷的居民都謙卑下來，因此耶和華的忿怒，在希西家在世的日子，沒有臨到他們身上。

ccb.text: 后来希西迦和耶路撒冷的居民发觉自己心里骄傲，就谦卑下来。因此，在希西迦有生之年，耶和华的烈怒没有临到他们。
